description: Trigger precision eval set for sf-docs skill routing. Tests whether the skill description correctly triggers (or avoids triggering) for various queries.

should_trigger.query: how do i set up buyer groups for my b2b store
whats the diff between LWR and aura store templates in commerce cloud
should_trigger.reason: Commerce template comparison needs SF docs

should_trigger.query: I'm getting 'FIELD_CUSTOM_VALIDATION_EXCEPTION' on my account trigger after adding a before update handler, the debug log shows line 42 in AccountTriggerHandler.cls
should_trigger.reason: Apex debugging question that benefits from SF docs reference

should_trigger.query: need help with the commerce search index -- it keeps failing after we added a custom field to Product2
what permission sets does a b2b buyer user need? our external community users cant see products
can you explain how screen flows work with input/output variables and the lightning:availableForFlowScreens interface
should_trigger.reason: Flow development question covered by SF docs

should_trigger.query: how do i create a lightning web component that uses wire service to call an apex method
should_trigger.reason: LWC + Apex development needs official docs

should_trigger.query: We want to enable einstein recommendations on our D2C storefront. Where do we start?
what are the governor limits for SOQL queries in batch apex -- we're hitting 'Too many query rows' in our nightly job
should_trigger.reason: Governor limits question needs authoritative SF docs

should_trigger.query: how does agentforce guided shopping work for b2b commerce and what are the LLM requirements

should_not_trigger.query: write me a python script that scrapes salesforce.com pricing page and dumps it to csv
should_not_trigger.reason: Web scraping task, not SF platform docs

should_not_trigger.query: how do I set up a playwright test for our checkout flow at https://mystore.com/checkout
should_not_trigger.reason: E2E testing tooling, not SF docs

should_not_trigger.query: SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Industry = 'Technology' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 50
should_not_trigger.reason: Pure SOQL data query -- just needs execution, not docs

should_not_trigger.query: configure our omnistudio integration procedure to call the shipping rate API and map the response to a DataRaptor transform
set up a marketing cloud journey that triggers when a contact fills out a form and sends a drip email sequence over 14 days
should_not_trigger.reason: Marketing Cloud journey builder, separate product domain

should_not_trigger.query: how do i create a data cloud segment based on unified individual profiles with engagement score > 80
should_not_trigger.reason: Data Cloud segmentation, handled by sf-datacloud skills

should_not_trigger.query: help me write a react component with tailwind css that shows a product card with image, price, and add-to-cart button
what AWS services should I use to build a serverless commerce backend with DynamoDB and Lambda
our shopify store checkout is broken on mobile -- the payment form overlaps the order summary on iphone 14
can you review my jest test file at tests/cart.test.ts -- the mock for the API call isn't working right
should_not_trigger.reason: Jest test debugging, generic dev task
